item.description:
# AI Usage Battery 0.1.3 (Build 4)
This release improves the Sparkle update experience.
## Highlights
- Enables Sparkle automatic update checks explicitly in the app bundle. - Enables Sparkle automatic update downloads by default. - Sets the scheduled automatic update check interval to one hour.
## Fixes
- Prevents the Sparkle automatic update permission prompt from interrupting the first manual `Check for Updates` flow. - Makes direct-distribution update behavior more predictable for users updating from older builds.
## Verification
- `swift test` passes. - Release app signing, notarization, stapling, Gatekeeper assessment, DMG generation, and DMG verification were run for this build.
